title: Evaluate old Restic releases and rollback backups
goal: Classify retained Restic runtime releases, installer backups and GDrive-retirement quarantine backups by rollback value, then remove only artifacts proven obsolete under a separately reviewed deletion plan.

approval.note: Inventory and deletion-plan review are allowed. Actual removal requires a separately reviewed exact path allowlist and rollback sufficiency proof.

acceptance.assertion: Every retained release and runtime/retirement backup is inventoried with path, source version, age, size, ownership and content or manifest hash.
The currently active release, one proven immediate rollback release and all receipts/backups needed to restore pre-retirement state are explicitly protected.
Any removal proposal is an exact path allowlist with expected hashes, benefit, risk, dwell period and abort conditions; wildcard cleanup is forbidden.
No artifact is removed before reviewed approval, current verifier success and confirmation that no process, worktree, lease or receipt still references it.
After any approved removal, runtime, rollback, timer, retirement and exact restore checks remain green and removed paths are recorded.

does_not_establish: permission to remove the active release
permission to remove the immediate rollback release or backup
